title: Content Coverage Gap — Critical Enablement Risk
subtitle: The Academy has 124 courses. Serving 102 resource journeys across all roles and applications requires far more.

gaps.name: General & Partner Onboarding
gaps.detail: Adequate for onboarding and foundation journeys

gaps.name: Platform & Model Building
gaps.detail: 15 platform journeys across 3 roles; most content is delivery-only, no Sales/Pre-Sales variants

gaps.name: SC & Finance Applications
gaps.detail: 21 courses serve 23 applications × 3 roles; mostly overviews, few delivery-ready or role-specific courses

gaps.name: AI Products (CoModeler · Agent Studio · Forecaster)
gaps.detail: Newest, fastest-growing product group — partners may wait months post-GA before enablement exists

gaps.name: Sales & Pre-Sales Role-Specific Content
gaps.detail: Sales and Pre-Sales journeys are severely underserved; most content assumes a delivery audience

flags.title: Product Readiness Gap
flags.body: New products (CoModeler, Agent Studio) launch with minimal enablement. Partners may go months post-GA without role-specific training available.

flags.title: Role Coverage Imbalance
flags.body: Delivery resources are reasonably served. Sales and Pre-Sales have almost no application-specific journeys — a direct impact on pipeline and deal quality.

flags.title: Depth vs. Breadth
flags.body: Most application courses are overview-level. Partners need delivery-ready, stage-specific content to reach Experienced and Delivering — these are largely absent today.
